arts.ttl: Sam Beukema: “Thiago Motta is a genius, he had me playing in midfield”
arts.sum: Sam Beukema, the Bologna defender linked with a potential move to Juventus in the upcoming January transfer window, recently shared insights about his experience under coach Thiago Motta in an interview with Cronache di spogliatoio. Reflecting on his time at Bologna, Beukema praised Motta’s innovative approach: “I called Thiago Motta a genius. When I arrived at Bologna, he asked me to play in midfield. I thought, ‘But I’m a central defender, what am I doing in midfield?’ Gradually, I understood his style of play. I started getting comfortable with having space behind me, which I wasn’t used to.
